x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom business rules on work order tables can conflict with Now Assist FSM AI Agent scheduling actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom Business Rules on wm_order and wm_task. Test Now Assist FSM with all customizations enabled in sub-production. Consider deactivating or consolidating redundant BRs before Now Assist go-live.
